message.content: In the collabspace-server project under D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-server, find the backend API endpoints related to "数据安全" (data security) - specifically about allowing/disallowing other spaces' smart tables to link or fetch data. Look for keywords like "dataSecurity", "data_security", "crossSpace", "cross_space", "allowLink", "allow_link", "foreignDatasheet" or similar. Also search for anything related to issue/task 2101. Show me the relevant controller, service, and any configuration code.
